channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Sam Altman wants to pay some lucky person $555,000 a year to look after OpenAI's AI - but obviously, all is not quite as it seems
item.description: OpenAI is hiring a new head to look after model abuse and safety for $555k plus equity, but it'll be high-stress.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Apple Fitness+ is kicking off 2026 with new workout programs
item.description: Apple Fitness+ is kicking off 2026 with new workout programs aimed at encouraging users to jump into – or jump back into – yoga, strength, or HIIT.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Krol, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Hell's Kitchen online: stream Battle of the States, season 24 for FREE from anywhere
item.description: Want to watch Hell's Kitchen from anywhere? Stream every new twist as chefs face brutal challengers, fiery eliminations, and Ramsay's relentless pressure.
item.dc:creator: Krishi Chowdhary, TechRadar

item.title: Back to the future: The most popular JavaScript stories and themes of 2025
item.description: Artificial intelligence and its promise to revolutionize programming—and possibly overthrow human sovereignty—is a central story of the post-Covid world. But for JavaScript developers, it is only one of the forces contending for center stage.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI agents 2025 recap: What happened and what to expect next year
item.description: In artificial intelligence, 2025 marked a decisive shift. Systems once confined to research labs and prototypes began to appear as everyday tools. At the center of this transition was the rise of AI agents—AI systems that can use other software tools and act on their own.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: The AI data fabric: Your blueprint for mission-ready intelligence
item.description: Building an AI-ready data fabric requires more than simple integration. It demands systems designed for adaptability, compliance and continuous intelligence. The post The AI data fabric: Your blueprint for mission-ready intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta buys startup Manus in latest move to advance its artificial intelligence efforts
item.description: Meta is buying artificial intelligence startup Manus, as the owner of Facebook and Instagram continues a push to amp-up AI offerings across its platforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Google may soon let users change their Gmail address
item.description: Google may be about to let users change their Gmail address. According to Telegram group Google Pixel Hub, via 9to5Google, a Hindi version of Gmail’s support page states that the feature is “being rolled out gradually to all users”.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What's inside Mexico's Popocatépetl? Scientists obtain first 3D images of the whole volcano
item.description: Scientists from Mexico’s National Autonomous University have created the first three-dimensional image of the Popocatépetl volcano's interior.
item.dc:creator: María Verza, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: SoftBank expands AI infrastructure ambitions with $4B DigitalBridge acquisition
item.description: SoftBank Group has announced plans to acquire DigitalBridge Group, an asset manager specializing in digital infrastructure investments such as data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks, in a deal valued at $4 billion.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: SoftBank expands AI infrastructure ambitions with $4B DigitalBridge acquisition
item.description: SoftBank Group has announced plans to acquire DigitalBridge Group, an asset manager specializing in digital infrastructure investments such as data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks, in a deal valued at $4 billion.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Here are the best free tools for discovering new music online
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. I love apps like Metronaut and Tomplay, which let me carry a collection of classical (sheet) music on my phone.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: 5 Best apps to use on ChatGPT right now
item.description: ChatGPT 2025 now connects to Apple Music, Canva, Expedia, TripAdvisor and OpenTable through built-in apps that help users create playlists, design graphics and more.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
